zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Helen Home於1436年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安海利斯時，她的父親Alexander Home 1st Lord Home28歲，母親Lady Marion Lauder11433歲。她和Sir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshire至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1513年2月在英國蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾普雷斯頓吉可享年77歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾普雷斯頓吉可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Helen Home于1436年出生在苏格兰米德洛迪安海利斯时，她的父亲Alexander Home 1st Lord Home28岁，母亲Lady Marion Lauder11433岁。她和Sir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshire至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1513年2月在英国苏格兰哈丁頓史爾普雷斯頓吉可享年77岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰哈丁頓史爾普雷斯頓吉可。

nameMeanings.name: Home
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Hume  .

English: habitational name from Home in Clifton on Teme or in Feckenham (Worcestershire) or from a minor place similarly named, a variant of Hamm (from Middle English ham(me), with rounding of the vowel before the nasal consonant to give hom(me)).

variants.name: Hume
meanings: Scottish (Lowlands) and northern English: variant of Hulme , with loss of l before the bilabial consonant /m/, as in the vocabulary word calm. See Holm and Home .

Scottish: habitational name either from the barony of Home or from Hume (or Home) in Berwickshire, from which the barony took its name. The placename derives from Old English hōum, dative plural form of hōh ‘heel, spur of land’.
History: A family of this name (see 2 above) have held the Earldom of Home since 1605.

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Helen Home was born in 1436, in Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland, her father, Alexander Home 1st Lord Home, was 28 and her mother, Lady Marion Lauder, was 11433. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Sir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshire. She died in February 1513, in Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 77, and was buried in Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Helen Home est née en 1436, à Hailes, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Alexander Home 1st Lord Home, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Marion Lauder, avait 11433 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Sir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshire. Elle est décédée en février 1513, à Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterrée à Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Helen Home 1436 in Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Home 1st Lord Home 28 und ihre Mutter Lady Marion Lauder 11433. Sie hatte mit Sir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshire mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb im Februar 1513 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Helen Home è nata il nel 1436 nel Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland, sua padre, Alexander Home 1st Lord Home, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Lady Marion Lauder, aveva 11433 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Sir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshire. Morì nel febbraio 1513, nel Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolta a Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Helen Homeが1436年にスコットランドミドロスアンヘイレスで生まれた時，父Alexander Home 1st Lord Homeは28歳，母Lady Marion Lauderは11433歳であった。彼女はSir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshireとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1513年2月にイギリススコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアプレストンキルクで77歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアプレストンキルクにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Helen Home(이)가 1436년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 하일레스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Home 1st Lord Home(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Marion Lauder(은)는 11433세였다. 그녀는 Sir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshire(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1513년 2월 영국 스코틀랜드 하딩토실르 프레스토커크에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 하딩토실르 프레스토커크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Helen Home nasceu em 1436, em Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Alexander Home 1st Lord Home, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Marion Lauder, tinha 11433 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Sir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshire. Ela faleceu em fevereiro de 1513, em Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 77 anos, e foi sepultada em Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Helen Home родилась в 1436 г. в местности хеилесь, мидлотян, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Alexander Home 1st Lord Home было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Marion Lauder, 11433. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Sir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshire. Она умерла февраль 1513 г. в местности престонкирк, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет и была похоронена в местности престонкирк, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Helen Home nació en 1436, en Hailes, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, Alexander Home 1st Lord Home, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Marion Lauder, tenía 11433 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Sir Adam Hepburn Master of Hailes, sheriff Berkwickshire. Murió en febrero de 1513, en Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultada en Prestonkirk, Haddingtonshire, Escocia, Reino Unido.
